# Sprint 0.2 Data Domain Identification

**Project:** Customer Churn Prediction and Retention System
**Sprint:** Sprint 0. Platform Foundation
**Objective:** Establish the foundation for the Customer Churn Prediction and Retention System by setting up the necessary infrastructure and integrating core data domains.

## Description
Identify the core data domains required for the system, including CRM, product and usage, support and sentiment, marketing engagement, and billing and payments.

## Deliverable
List of core data domains and their descriptions
